reviews.comment:
El servicompras es bastante completo y la higiene de los baños es sobresaliente. Hay WiFi y te puedes sentar tanto adentro como afuera.

(Translated by Google)
The convenience store is quite comprehensive and the restrooms are exceptionally clean. There's Wi-Fi and you can sit both inside and outside.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBb2V5b0JBEAE

reviews.comment:
Es la estación con mucha área verde,y un sevicompra bien surtido y la atención muy excelente, y el combustible muy bueno x q es controlado con una pasta de agua q ninguna tiene para verificar si los tanques tienes agua ,Y ESO ME GUSTA Y ME DA LA SEGURIDAD DE LO Q YO CARGO ,

(Translated by Google)
It's a station with a lot of green space, a well-stocked convenience store, and excellent service. The fuel is very good because it's checked with a water paste that no other station has to verify if the tanks contain water, and I like that because it gives me confidence in what I'm getting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14033224425369215469/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRa1l2eXlRRRAB
